title: bolbitis crispatula
intro: Bolbitis crispatula, also known as the fan-leaved fern or fan-shaped fern, is a species of plant in the family Lomariopsidaceae. It is a type of tropical fern native to Southeast Asia, particularly in Malaysia, Thailand, and Indonesia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Bolbitis crispatula can be used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions to promote health benefits, including reducing blood pressure and improving digestion.
